title: Debug Webhook Trigger Authentication Redirect Issue
job:
Investigate why the webhook trigger at /webhook/job-complete is redirecting to /login instead of processing the request.

Tasks:
1. Check the middleware.js to understand authentication flow
2. Check if webhook triggers should bypass authentication
3. Look at how other triggers handle unauthenticated requests
4. Identify if there's a specific header or configuration needed for webhook triggers
5. Document findings in `logs/trigger-auth-debug.md`

Context: User created a trigger at /webhook/job-complete but curl requests redirect to /login. Need to understand if triggers require authentication or if there's a middleware issue.
